title: Department Manager Vacancy at Hypercity Advisory Limited - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Department Manager Vacancy at Hypercity Advisory Limited - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Hypercity Advisory Limited is actively seeking a talented and motivated Department Manager to join our dynamic team in Thane. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Hypercity Advisory Limited:
Hypercity Advisory Limited is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Thane, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Hypercity Advisory Limited!
